title: Skeleton LOC Prediction Output
description: Output of the predict-loc-skeleton skill. Drafts declaration-only skeleton in the project language, counts non-blank/non-comment lines, applies a per-language multiplier, and projects total LOC.

spec_path.description: Absolute path to the analysed spec file.

language.description: Dominant source language detected for the project.

skeleton_loc.description: Non-blank, non-comment line count across all skeleton files written under {OUTPUT_DIR}/skeleton/.

multiplier_used.description: Per-language multiplier applied to skeleton_loc. Swift 1.7, Kotlin 1.5, TypeScript 1.4, Python 2.0.

projected_loc.description: round(skeleton_loc × multiplier_used). The size signal consumed by scope-synthesize.

severity.description: Band determined by README § Scope Metrics thresholds against projected_loc.

skeleton_files.description: Relative paths under {OUTPUT_DIR}/skeleton/ for each sketched file.

unsketched.description: Types or methods the agent could not sketch because the spec was too vague. Acts as a buildability hint.
